name: SentinelX402
description: Cyber threat intelligence APIs for AI agents, paid via x402 micropayments. Real-time phishing detection, CVE risk analysis, malicious domain/IP reputation scoring.

tools.name: domain_risk_lookup
tools.description: Look up threat risk score for a domain. Returns risk score, threat type, confidence, and related suspicious domains.

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Check IP address reputation and threat associations.

tools.name: threat_feed
tools.description: Get latest threat indicators feed with pagination.

tools.name: cve_risk_analysis
tools.description: Get detailed CVE risk analysis including exploit probability, patch urgency, and ransomware risk.

tools.name: recent_critical_cves
tools.description: Get recent critical CVEs from the last 7 days with risk analysis.

tools.name: cve_search
tools.description: Search CVEs by keyword with enhanced risk scoring.
